title: Fossils found in Scotland just pushed back the origin of land-walking animals by 14 million years and placed them in a stretch of the fossil record where nothing was supposed to exist
description: In 1984, an amateur palaeontologist found a small, nearly complete fossil in a quarry in West Lothian, Scotland. The creature, later named Westlothiana lizziae, is about 20 centimetres long and resembles a salamander. It is one of the earliest known examples of a four-limbed animal that had made the transition from water to land, a [...] The post Fossils found in Scotland just pushed back the origin of land-walking animals by 14 million years and placed them in a stretch of the fossil record where nothing was supposed to exist appeared first on Space Daily .

title: 📅 Tween Archaeology Dig with State Park Ranger – June 10
Need to reduce fossil fuel imports through alternative fuels, biofuels: Nitin Gadkari
description: Union Minister for Road Transport and Highways Nitin Gadkari on Thursday said India must accelerate the adoption of alternative fuels and biofuels to reduce air pollution and cut dependence on imported fossil fuels, as he launched Maruti Suzuki's first flex-fuel car in India at the 'India Goes Flex' event.
